backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: fixing the white screen on load issue with error boundaries and CDN null-guards, and auditing index.html CDN script loading order and PDF.js workerSrc configuration.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each tool component's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark modes using raw OKLCH channel values, plus base body and border styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that synchronously loads CDN scripts for PDF.js (with workerSrc initialization), jsPDF, pdf-lib, and Mammoth.js before the React module bundle to ensure globals are available at runtime.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that manages active tool state, renders the main layout (Hero, ToolGrid, Footer, FloatingParticles), and opens the selected tool inside a ConversionModal, all wrapped in an ErrorBoundary.
Modal dialog component that wraps tool content in a styled Dialog with a header showing the tool title and a close button.
frontend/src/components/ConversionProgre: Progress indicator component displaying a labeled percentage bar with a spinning loader icon for file conversion operations.
frontend/src/components/DownloadButton.t: Button component that triggers a Blob download via a temporary anchor element, showing a checkmark icon when a result Blob is available.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled component tree errors and renders a fallback UI with the error message and buttons to reset or reload the page.
frontend/src/components/FileUploadZone.t: A reusable drag-and-drop file upload component that supports file selection via click or drag, displays accepted file types, and lists selected files with removal options.
frontend/src/components/FloatingParticle: A canvas-based background animation component that renders floating, pulsing colored particles with glow effects that drift across the screen.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A site footer component displaying the ConvertHub brand, a list of available tools, privacy guarantees, and a copyright bar with a Caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: The page header component showing the ConvertHub logo, app name, tagline, and decorative background glow orbs with a spinning ring animation.
frontend/src/components/ToolCard.tsx: A styled button card component for a single conversion tool, featuring hover animations, a gradient icon, badge label, and an arrow call-to-action.
frontend/src/components/ToolGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of all eight conversion tool cards (PDF, image, Word tools) using ToolCard, with a section heading and click handler to open a selected tool.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed since all processing is client-side; exports nothing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds utility classes for glass effects and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/tools/ImageCompressor.tsx: Client-side image compression tool that uses an HTML Canvas to re-encode images as JPEG at a user-selected quality level and provides a download button with size reduction stats.
frontend/src/tools/ImageResizer.tsx: Client-side image resizing tool that loads image dimensions, supports optional aspect-ratio locking, draws the resized result onto a Canvas, and offers a download of the output.
frontend/src/tools/ImageToPdf.tsx: Client-side tool that accepts multiple images, uses the jsPDF library to combine them into a multi-page PDF, and triggers a browser download of the result.
frontend/src/tools/ImageToWord.tsx: React component that converts an uploaded image (PNG/JPEG) into a .docx file by manually constructing a ZIP-based OOXML package with the image embedded at scaled dimensions.
frontend/src/tools/MergePdfs.tsx: React component that lets users upload, reorder, and merge multiple PDF files client-side using the pdf-lib library, then download the combined result.
frontend/src/tools/PdfToImage.tsx: React component that converts each page of an uploaded PDF into a PNG image using PDF.js rendered onto a canvas, with per-page progress tracking and individual/bulk download.
frontend/src/tools/PdfToWord.tsx: React component that extracts text from a PDF via PDF.js and packages it into a minimal .docx file by manually building a ZIP archive with OOXML structure.
frontend/src/tools/WordToPdf.tsx: React component that converts an uploaded .docx file to PDF by extracting raw text with Mammoth.js and rendering it into a paginated PDF using jsPDF.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, CSS-variable-based colors, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations including float, fadeIn, and slideUp.
project_state.json: Tracks ConvertHub project state (version 5), describing an 8-tool client-side PDF/Image conversion web app with dark glassmorphism UI, known white-screen bug, and architectural notes about CDN libraries (PDF.js, jsPDF, Canvas API).
